evals.name: full-sweep
evals.prompt:
Fix all issues:

```yaml
name: CI/CD
on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop, staging]
  pull_request:
    branches: ['*']

env:
  DATABASE_URL: postgresql://admin:supersecret123@localhost:5432/mydb
  DEPLOY_TOKEN: ghp_abc123secrettoken456
  AWS_SECRET_KEY: AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE

jobs:
  pipeline:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm run lint
      - run: npx tsc --noEmit
      - run: npm test
      - run: npm run build
      - run: npm run test:integration
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: postgresql://admin:supersecret123@localhost:5432/mydb
      - run: npx playwright test
      - run: |
          if [ "${{ github.ref }}" = "refs/heads/main" ]; then
            npm run deploy:production
          fi

  deploy-production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [pipeline]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '18'
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm run build
      - run: npm run deploy:production
```

This is a TypeScript monorepo with packages/api and packages/web. Output fixed code only.

assertions.trap: Missing security audit (npm audit) and bundle size check from the gate sequence
assertions.description: Every PR must pass all gates: lint, type-check, unit tests, build, integration, E2E, security audit, bundle size

assertions.trap: All steps run sequentially in a single job instead of lint/typecheck/test as parallel independent jobs
assertions.description: Lint, type-check, unit tests, and build should run as parallel independent jobs, not sequential steps

assertions.trap: Uses npm install instead of npm ci, and setup-node has no cache option
assertions.description: Use setup-node with cache: npm for dependency caching; use npm ci for reproducible installs

assertions.trap: No actions/cache for build artifacts (.next/cache, dist, etc.)
assertions.description: Cache build artifacts using actions/cache with content-aware keys (hashFiles for lockfile + source)

assertions.trap: DATABASE_URL, DEPLOY_TOKEN, and AWS_SECRET_KEY are hardcoded plaintext in the workflow env block
assertions.description: All credentials must be stored in GitHub Secrets, never hardcoded in workflow files

assertions.trap: Uses actions/checkout@v3 and actions/setup-node@v3 instead of @v4
assertions.description: Pin actions to current major versions (v4 for checkout, setup-node, cache, upload-artifact)

assertions.trap: Integration and E2E tests run in the same job as build instead of as separate jobs with needs: [build]
assertions.description: Integration and E2E tests must run after build succeeds, as separate jobs with needs dependency

assertions.trap: Playwright runs without installing browser dependencies (npx playwright install --with-deps chromium)
assertions.description: E2E jobs must install Playwright browser dependencies before running tests

assertions.trap: No upload-artifact step to capture Playwright report on failure
assertions.description: E2E tests should upload artifacts (playwright-report) on failure for debugging

assertions.trap: Integration tests reference localhost DB but no services container (postgres) is defined
assertions.description: Database integration tests must use a services container with health checks

assertions.trap: No concurrency group defined; multiple pushes to same branch run simultaneously
assertions.description: Use concurrency groups to cancel redundant runs on the same branch

assertions.trap: All jobs run on every change with no path filters despite being a monorepo with packages/api and packages/web
assertions.description: Monorepo CI must use path filtering (dorny/paths-filter or on.pull_request.paths) to skip unrelated jobs

assertions.trap: Production deploy is a raw npm run deploy with no staged rollout, no canary, no rollback mechanism
assertions.description: Deployments must use a staged rollout (staging first, then production) with a rollback mechanism

assertions.trap: No rollback workflow or workflow_dispatch mechanism exists to revert a bad deploy
assertions.description: Every deployment must be reversible; ship a rollback workflow with workflow_dispatch

assertions.trap: Deploys directly to production with no staging step or manual verification gate
assertions.description: Follow staged rollout: staging deploy (auto) then manual verify then production deploy

assertions.trap: pull_request triggers on all branches ('*') instead of scoped to main
assertions.description: CI should trigger on pull_request to main and push to main, not wildcard branches

assertions.trap: CI has production secrets (DEPLOY_TOKEN, AWS_SECRET_KEY) available to all jobs including tests
assertions.description: CI never has production secrets; separate secrets per environment with minimal scope
